utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2) travel_dates: 'May 15–19, 2024' — fully specified.
3) transportation: 'Standard Airline Economy, round trip for four passengers (~€1,600 with hotel)' — gives type, passenger count, cost (although bundled with hotel) — acceptable.
4) accommodation: '4-star Boutique Stay, centrally located, 4 nights (included in ~€1,600 package)' — type, location, duration, cost included — acceptable.
5) activities: two named activities, each with per person and total cost — fully specified.
6) additional_services: restaurant reservations with names, dates, times, description — fully specified.
7) total_budget: cost breakdown for flights/hotel, each activity, and total — fully specified.
All 7 items are present and reasonably detailed.
